title: Ketu Chalisa
intro: Shri Ketu Chalisa: Full Path, Meaning, and Benefits - Hymn to Lord Ketu
description:
|| Shri Ketu Chalisa ||

|| Doha ||
Namo namo Shri Ketu sukhakari. Kasht haro santap hamare||
(Salutations again and again to the bringer of happiness, Lord Ketu. Remove all our troubles and sorrows.)
Jayati jayati Shri Ketu maharaja. Bhav bandhan se sabko traja||
(Victory, victory to Lord Ketu. You liberate everyone from the shackles of worldly attachments.)

|| Chaupai ||
Jayati jayati Ketu dev dayala. Sada bhaktan ke sankat hara||
(Victory to the merciful Lord Ketu. You are always the remover of your devotees' crises.)
Ketu dev chhaya grah jaane. Sabhi grahon ka dosh mitane||
(Lord Ketu is known as a shadow planet. You erase the defects of all other planets.)
Sir kata par dhad na chhoda. Amrit paan kiya sant moda||
(Even when the head was severed, you did not abandon the torso. You consumed the nectar and altered the path of saints.)
Rahu Ketu sangram machaya. Devtaon ko bhi daraya||
(Rahu and Ketu created a great battle. You even struck fear into the gods.)
Bhanu graas Chandra ko dhaya. Sabhi grahon par prabhav dikhaya||
(You rushed to eclipse the Sun and Moon. You demonstrated your influence upon all the planets.)
Ketu grah dusht narak sansara. Sabhi sankaton ko door bhaganevala||
(Lord Ketu, you are the remover of all crises and troubles of this world.)
Ketu dev ki mahima bhari. Sabhi grahon mein Ketu nyare||
(The glory of Lord Ketu is immense. Among all planets, Ketu is unique.)
Ketu grah ka prabhav hatave. Sabhi janon ko sukh dilave||
(You remove the negative influence of the planet Ketu. You bring happiness to all people.)
Kaalsarp dosh bhi tare. Ketu Chalisa jo jan gave||
(You remove the Kaalsarp defect. Whoever sings this Ketu Chalisa.)
Ketu grah ke mantra jape jo. Jeevan mein sab sukh pave so||
(Whoever chants the mantras of planet Ketu. They attain all happiness in life.)
Shatru se jo bhaybheet hove. Ketu dev ka dhyan dharave||
(Whoever is afraid of enemies. Should meditate upon Lord Ketu.)
Ketu dev ki sharan jo ave. Sabhi kashton se mukti pave||
(Whoever comes under the refuge of Lord Ketu. Attains liberation from all troubles.)
Ketu dev ka dhyan lagave. Jeevan mein sukh shanti pave||
(By meditating on Lord Ketu. One attains happiness and peace in life.)
Ketu dev ka yash gave. Sabhi sankat door bhagave||
(Whoever sings the glory of Lord Ketu. Drives all crises far away.)
Bhakti bhav se Ketu dev ko. Jo bhi bhakt sumire man mein||
(With devotion towards Lord Ketu. Whichever devotee remembers him in their mind.)
Sabhi sankat kasht mitave. Ketu dev kripa barsave||
(Wipes out all crises and troubles. Lord Ketu showers his grace.)
Ketu dev ki sharan jo ave. Jeevan mein sabhi sukh pave||
(Whoever comes under the refuge of Lord Ketu. Attains all happiness in life.)
Ketu dev ka yash gave. Sabhi sankat door bhagave||
(Whoever sings the glory of Lord Ketu. Drives all crises far away.)
Kripa drishti Ketu dev ki. Jo bhi bhakt man mein dhyave||
(The grace of Lord Ketu. Whichever devotee meditates upon in their mind.)
Ketu dev ke charanon mein. Sabhi bhakt sheesh navave||
(At the feet of Lord Ketu. All devotees bow their heads.)
Ketu dev ki mahima nyari. Sabhi grahon mein Ketu bhari||
(The glory of Lord Ketu is unique. Among all planets, Ketu is powerful.)
Sarpakar Ketu dev ka. Jo bhi bhakt sumire man mein||
(Of the serpent-formed Lord Ketu. Whichever devotee remembers him in their mind.)
Ketu grah ka dosh mitave. Sabhi janon ko sukh dilave||
(Wipes out the defect of planet Ketu. Brings happiness to all people.)

|| Doha ||
Namo namo Shri Ketu sukhakari. Kasht haro santap hamare||
(Salutations again and again to the bringer of happiness, Lord Ketu. Remove all our troubles and sorrows.)
Jayati jayati Shri Ketu maharaja. Bhav bandhan se sabko traja||
(Victory, victory to Lord Ketu. You liberate everyone from the shackles of worldly attachments.)

faq.q1: Why is the Ketu Chalisa recited?
faq.a1: Ketu is considered the significator of spiritual knowledge and liberation (Moksha). This Chalisa is recited to pacify the negative effects of Ketu, remove sudden obstacles in life, and attain spiritual growth.
faq.q2: What is the most auspicious day to recite the Ketu Chalisa?
faq.a2: Tuesday is considered the most auspicious day for worshiping Ketu Dev. Apart from this, it can be recited whenever you feel uncertainty in life.
faq.q3: Does the Ketu Chalisa bring peace to life?
faq.a3: Yes, Ketu often brings sudden changes and instability in life. Reciting this Chalisa brings stability to the mind and provides the patience to face difficult situations.
faq.q4: Is this Chalisa useful for those on a spiritual path?
faq.a4: Definitely. Ketu is considered the 'causative planet for Moksha.' For those interested in meditation or spiritual practice, this Chalisa is very helpful.
faq.q5: Are there any special rules for reciting it?
faq.a5: No, there are no special rules or complex rituals required. Reciting it with a pure mind and complete faith is sufficient to please Ketu Dev.
